name: docxtemplater
when_to_use: 「设计师做好的 Word/PPTX 模板 + 每条记录套数据批量出件」(合同、offer letter、证书、批量报告)用它——保留模板原有排版/页眉页脚/样式,注入 {placeholder}/{#loop}/{condition};从零程序化构建文档用 docx,只预览 .docx 用 docx-preview/mammoth。
why_valuable: 邮件合并(mail-merge)进 Word 模板:原生 AI 无法在保持复杂 Word 排版的前提下注数据。docxtemplater 独占「现有模板套数据」这一档(且一并覆盖 pptx/xlsx 模板)。

data_in.note: 输入 = 一个含 {tags} 的 .docx 模板字节 + 一份数据对象。模板字节须先经 PizZip 装成同步 zip 实例喂给构造器。render 后 doc.toBlob()/toUint8Array() 取件。

schema.templateDocx: ArrayBuffer | Uint8Array —— 含 {name} / {#items}...{/items} / {#cond}...{/cond} 标签的 .docx(或 .pptx)模板字节
schema.data: Record<string,any> —— 标签→值;数组值配 {#loop}...{/loop} 循环渲染,布尔配 {#cond} 条件显隐

provides._note: headless-primitive:产出 docx/pptx 二进制,不渲染,无 carriers 矩阵。

api_surface.construct: new Docxtemplater(zip, { paragraphLoop:true, linebreaks:true })(default 导入)
api_surface.render: doc.render(data) —— 就地替换标签、展开循环/条件

peer.note: docxtemplater 需同步 zip;用 PizZip@3(new PizZip(arrayBuffer))装模板字节,不能用异步的 JSZip。PizZip 是 default 导出,license (MIT OR GPL-3.0)。

boot.note: Docxtemplater 与 PizZip 都是 default 导出。render 对模板语法错误会抛带定位信息的 error,消费 AI 应 try/catch。产字节无渲染,无 shadow/head 足迹;图片/HTML 等高级标签({%image}/{~html})需付费模块,开源版仅覆盖文本/循环/条件。

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr docxtemplater@3.69.2 +esm (129KB): export{zn as default} — boot uses default import. js/docxtemplater.d.ts: class Docxtemplater{ constructor(zip,options?); render(data?):this; getZip(); toBlob(options?):Blob; toUint8Array():Uint8Array; toArrayBuffer(); toBase64(); toBuffer() } — boot's construct/render/toBlob all match. Peer PizZip@3.2.0 (MIT OR GPL-3.0) +esm exports include 'J as default'; loads 200; new PizZip(bytes) is the synchronous zip loader docxtemplater's constructor requires (its +esm references JSZip-compatible loadZip). Global-footprint grep over docxtemplater +esm: document.head 0, document.body 0, document.createElement 0, <style/insertRule 0, addEventListener 0 — pure-JS (XML via @xmldom/xmldom) byte producer, renders nothing, trivially shadow-safe.

en.when_to_use: Use it for "a designer-made Word/PPTX template + per-record data for batch document generation" (contracts, offer letters, certificates, bulk reports). It preserves the template's layout, headers/footers, and styles while injecting {placeholder}/{#loop}/{condition}. Use docx to build documents programmatically from scratch; use docx-preview/mammoth only to preview .docx.
en.why_valuable: It provides mail-merge into Word templates: native AI cannot inject data while preserving complex Word layout. docxtemplater uniquely covers the "existing template filled with data" use case, including pptx/xlsx templates.

data_in.note: Input = bytes for a .docx template containing {tags} + one data object. The template bytes must first be loaded into a synchronous zip instance with PizZip and passed to the constructor. After render, retrieve the result with doc.toBlob()/toUint8Array().

schema.templateDocx: ArrayBuffer | Uint8Array -- Bytes for a .docx (or .pptx) template containing {name} / {#items}...{/items} / {#cond}...{/cond} tags
schema.data: Record<string,any> -- Tag -> value; array values render loops with {#loop}...{/loop}, and booleans control conditional visibility with {#cond}
